name: Breakfast Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Spinach, firmly packed, washed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the spinach in a saucepan with only the water you washed it in. If washing the spinach the night before, sprinkle a little water over the leaves.
2. Cook, stirring, until just wilted (about 2 minutes). Remove from the saucepan and drain well.
3. Place the brown rice, corn, and salsa in the saucepan. Heat through, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the cooked spinach.
5. Spoon a line of the mixture down the center of each tortilla and roll.
You can use 8 tortillas for 8 servings. This recipe provides 166 calories with 2.3 grams fat per serving (6 total).
